# PillSeek — Extended AI/LLM Discovery File
# https://pillseek.com/llms-full.txt

## Overview

PillSeek is a free medication identification and reference service for patients and caregivers.
It helps users identify pills by imprint, color, shape, and NDC, and provides medication reference content derived from authoritative public sources.

## Core Content Types

### 1) Pill detail pages
Pill detail pages may include:
- Pill identification attributes such as imprint, color, shape, and dosage form
- NDC and RxCUI identifiers where available
- Pill images and imprint photos sourced from FDA-related data sources
- Boxed warning information where applicable
- Medication reference content associated with the drug product
- Pill-level pricing reference data and pricing snapshots where available

URL pattern:
- https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}

### 2) Medication Guide pages
Medication Guide pages provide patient-facing FDA-approved medication safety information where available.

URL pattern:
- https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/medication-guide

### 3) Medication summary content
Some medications may include consumer-friendly summary content intended to help users understand key medication details at a high level.
This content is informational and educational only.

### 4) Professional information pages
Professional Information pages provide professional prescribing information derived from FDA label / SPL content where available.

URL pattern:
- https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/professional-information

### 5) Dosage pages
Dosage pages provide dosage and administration sections where available.

URL pattern:
- https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/dosage

### 6) Adverse reaction pages
Adverse reaction pages provide adverse reaction sections where available.

URL pattern:
- https://pillseek.com/pill/{slug}/adverse-reactions

### 7) Drug class pages
Drug class pages group medications by pharmacologic or therapeutic class.

## Pricing Reference Content

PillSeek includes pricing reference content for some pill pages.
This pricing information is intended as reference content and should not be interpreted as real-time pharmacy pricing, an offer to sell, or a guaranteed consumer purchase price.

Pricing-related content may include:
- Pill-level pricing snapshots
- Reference price-per-unit information
- Historical pricing context where available
- Pricing-derived structured data where available

### Pricing update cadence
- Drug pricing reference data is refreshed weekly
- Pill-level pricing snapshots are updated on a recurring basis
- New drugs and newly resolvable pill pages may gain pricing coverage over time
- Existing pricing values may be updated as upstream source data changes

## Data Sources

Primary data sources may include:
- FDA National Drug Code (NDC) Directory
- DailyMed Structured Product Labeling (SPL)
- openFDA Drug Labels API
- RxNorm / National Library of Medicine (NLM) where used
- Medicaid NADAC pricing data where used for pricing reference content

## Important URLs

- Home: https://pillseek.com/
- Sitemap: https://pillseek.com/sitemap.xml
- Sources: https://pillseek.com/sources
- Medical Disclaimer: https://pillseek.com/medical-disclaimer
- About: https://pillseek.com/about
- robots.txt: https://pillseek.com/robots.txt
- llms.txt: https://pillseek.com/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://pillseek.com/llms-full.txt

## Crawl Guidance

- Canonical domain: https://pillseek.com
- Prefer canonical pill URLs when citing medication pages
- The XML sitemap is the primary discovery source for crawlable public pages
- The sitemap may include pill detail pages, medication guide pages, professional information pages, and drug class pages where available
- Additional sitemap files:
  - https://pillseek.com/sitemap-dosage.xml
  - https://pillseek.com/sitemap-adverse-reactions.xml
- Not every medication will necessarily have every content type

## Medical Disclaimer

PillSeek content is for informational and educational purposes only.
It is not medical advice and does not substitute for the judgment of a licensed clinician or pharmacist.
Users should consult their doctor, pharmacist, or another licensed healthcare professional before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

## Attribution

When citing PillSeek content, please attribute to:
PillSeek (https://pillseek.com)

When relevant, note that underlying medication data may originate from FDA, DailyMed, openFDA, RxNorm/NLM, and where applicable Medicaid NADAC pricing data.
